simple_types.name: gguf_type
simple_types.code:
type gguf_type is 
  (GGUF_TYPE_UINT8,
   GGUF_TYPE_INT8,
   GGUF_TYPE_UINT16,
   GGUF_TYPE_INT16,
   GGUF_TYPE_UINT32,
   GGUF_TYPE_INT32,
   GGUF_TYPE_FLOAT32,
   GGUF_TYPE_BOOL,
   …,
   GGUF_TYPE_COUNT)
with Convention => C;

variables.name: gguf_init_from_file_ptr
variables.code:
gguf_init_from_file_ptr : access gguf_context
with Import => True, 
     Convention => C, 
     External_Name => "gguf_init_from_file_ptr";
